# Codex App-Server Protocol — Vendored Types

This directory contains TypeScript bindings for the `codex app-server` JSON-RPC
protocol, generated by `codex app-server generate-ts --experimental`.

**Do not edit these files by hand.** They are regenerated from a pinned codex
binary version.

## Pinning

The expected `codex --version` is recorded in
[`build/codex/codex-version.txt`](../../../../../../../../build/codex/codex-version.txt).
We install codex via `@openai/codex` as a dev dependency, so the version stays
locked across machines and CI.

## Regenerating

```sh
npm run codex:gen-protocol
```

This wipes `generated/` (except `README.md`) and rewrites it from the locally
installed codex. The script fails if the binary version doesn't match the pin —
bump the pin if you intend the upgrade, then run again.

Override with `--no-version-check` for ad-hoc experimentation.

## Binary resolution

The generator looks for codex in this order:

1. `$CODEX_BIN` environment variable
2. `node_modules/@openai/codex-<platform>-<arch>/.../bin/codex` (vendored via npm)
3. `which codex` (PATH fallback)
